dict.string: tell application "System Events" try repeat set _groups to groups of UI element 1 of scroll area 1 of group 1 of window "Notification Center" of application process "NotificationCenter" set numGroups to number of _groups if numGroups = 0 then exit repeat end if repeat with _group in _groups set _actions to actions of _group set actionPerformed to false repeat with _action in _actions if description of _action is in {"Close", "Clear All", "Schließen", "Alle entfernen", "Cerrar", "Borrar todo", "关闭", "清除全部", "Fermer", "Tout effacer", "Закрыть", "Очистить все", "إغلاق", "مسح الكل", "Fechar", "Limpar tudo", "閉じる", "すべてクリア", "बंद करें", "सभी हटाएं", "Zamknij", "Wyczyść wszystko", "닫기", "모두 지우기"} then perform _action set actionPerformed to true exit repeat end if end repeat if actionPerformed then exit repeat end if end repeat end repeat end try end tell

tell application "System Events" try set _groups to groups of UI element 1 of scroll area 1 of group 1 of window "Notification Center" of application process "NotificationCenter"
set closeActions to {"Close", "Clear All", "Schließen", "Alle entfernen", "Cerrar", "Borrar todo", "关闭", "清除全部", "Fermer", "Tout effacer", "Закрыть", "Очистить все", "إغلاق", "مسح الكل", "Fechar", "Limpar tudo", "閉じる", "すべてクリア", "बंद करें", "सभी हटाएं", "Zamknij", "Wyczyść wszystko", "닫기", "모두 지우기"}
repeat with _group in _groups set _actions to actions of _group
repeat with _action in _actions if description of _action is in closeActions then perform _action exit repeat end if end repeat end repeat -- on error errMsg -- display dialog "Error: " & errMsg end try end tell

-- Error-Tolerant Notification Center Exploration Script
on safeGet(objRef, propName) try tell application "System Events" to tell objRef to return value of attribute propName on error return "<unable to read " & propName & ">" end try end safeGet
on describeElement(elem) set elemInfo to {} set end of elemInfo to " Class: " & (my safeGet(elem, "AXRole")) set end of elemInfo to " Description: " & (my safeGet(elem, "AXDescription")) set end of elemInfo to " Name: " & (my safeGet(elem, "AXTitle")) set end of elemInfo to " Role: " & (my safeGet(elem, "AXRoleDescription")) set end of elemInfo to " Size: " & (my safeGet(elem, "AXSize")) set end of elemInfo to " Position: " & (my safeGet(elem, "AXPosition")) return elemInfo end describeElement
on exploreGroup(groupElem) set groupInfo to {} set end of groupInfo to "Exploring group:" set groupInfo to groupInfo & (my describeElement(groupElem))
try tell application "System Events" to tell groupElem set subElements to every UI element set end of groupInfo to "Number of subelements: " & (count of subElements) repeat with i from 1 to count of subElements set currentElement to item i of subElements set end of groupInfo to "Subelement " & i & ":" set elemInfo to my describeElement(currentElement) set groupInfo to groupInfo & elemInfo
if (my safeGet(currentElement, "AXRole")) is "AXGroup" then set groupInfo to groupInfo & (my exploreGroup(currentElement)) end if end repeat end tell on error errMsg set end of groupInfo to "Error exploring group: " & errMsg end try
return groupInfo end exploreGroup
on run set debugInfo to {}
tell application "System Events" try set end of debugInfo to "Accessing System Events"
if exists process "NotificationCenter" then set end of debugInfo to "NotificationCenter process exists"
tell process "NotificationCenter" set end of debugInfo to "Accessing NotificationCenter process"
if exists window "Notification Center" then set end of debugInfo to "Notification Center window exists" set notificationWindow to window "Notification Center"
set windowInfo to my describeElement(notificationWindow) set debugInfo to debugInfo & windowInfo
if exists group 1 of notificationWindow then set end of debugInfo to "Main group exists" set mainGroup to group 1 of notificationWindow set debugInfo to debugInfo & (my exploreGroup(mainGroup)) else set end of debugInfo to "No main group found in Notification Center window" end if else set end of debugInfo to "Notification Center window not found" end if end tell else set end of debugInfo to "NotificationCenter process not found" end if on error errMsg set end of debugInfo to "Error: " & errMsg end try end tell
-- Log all collected debug information repeat with infoLine in debugInfo log infoLine end repeat
return "Debug Script Completed" end run

-- macOS 15 Sequoia -- Set of close action phrases in multiple languages property closeActionSet : {"Close", "Clear All", "Schließen", "Alle entfernen", "Cerrar", "Borrar todo", "关闭", "清除全部", "Fermer", "Tout effacer", "Закрыть", "Очистить все", "إغلاق", "مسح الكل", "Fechar", "Limpar tudo", "閉じる", "すべてクリア", "बंद करें", "सभी हटाएं", "Zamknij", "Wyczyść wszystko", "닫기", "모두 지우기"}
-- Function to perform close action on a given element on closeNotification(elemRef) tell application "System Events" try set theActions to actions of elemRef repeat with act in theActions if description of act is in closeActionSet then perform act return true end if end repeat end try end tell return false end closeNotification
-- Function to recursively search for and close notifications on searchAndCloseNotifications(elemRef) tell application "System Events" -- If the element has subelements, search them first try set subElements to UI elements of elemRef repeat with subElem in subElements if my searchAndCloseNotifications(subElem) then return true end if end repeat end try
-- Try to close the current element if it's a notification if my closeNotification(elemRef) then return true end if end tell return false end searchAndCloseNotifications
-- Main script to clear notifications on run tell application "System Events" if not (exists process "NotificationCenter") then log "NotificationCenter process not found" return end if
tell process "NotificationCenter" if not (exists window "Notification Center") then log "Notification Center window not found" return end if
set notificationWindow to window "Notification Center"
-- Main loop to clear notifications repeat try if not my searchAndCloseNotifications(notificationWindow) then -- If no notifications were closed, we're done exit repeat end if
-- Reduced delay to speed up the script delay 0.1 on error errMsg -- If an error occurs, log it and exit the loop log "Error: " & errMsg exit repeat end try end repeat end tell end tell end run

#!/bin/bash
# Sending notifications for Group1 terminal-notifier -message "Message 1" -title "Title 1" -group "Group1" terminal-notifier -message "Message 2" -title "Title 2" -group "Group1" terminal-notifier -message "Message 3" -title "Title 3" -group "Group1"
# Sending notifications for Group2 terminal-notifier -message "Message 4" -title "Title 4" -group "Group2" terminal-notifier -message "Message 5" -title "Title 5" -group "Group2" terminal-notifier -message "Message 6" -title "Title 6" -group "Group2" terminal-notifier -message "Message 7" -title "Title 7" -group "Group2"
# Sending notifications for Group3 terminal-notifier -message "Message 8" -title "Title 8" -group "Group3" terminal-notifier -message "Message 9" -title "Title 9" -group "Group3" terminal-notifier -message "Message 10" -title "Title 10" -group "Group3"

# Changelog
## Version 1.4.3 - Added support for Korean
## Version 1.4.2 - Make the script faster
## Version 1.4.1 - Added support for macOS 15.0 Beta 6 (24A5320a)
## Version 1.4 - Added support for macOS 15 Sequoia
## Version 1.3 - Added support for macOS 14 Sonoma - Added notification tester
## Version 1.2 - Made the script faster - Added support for more languages
## Version 1.1 - Updated to [lancethomps' gist revision](https://gist.github.com/lancethomps/a5ac103f334b171f70ce2ff983220b4f/revisions#diff-83192c5d8a65f0aa536c1b7346b1d2a4bf1d05e94c5d14d0f68193952d081232)
## Version 1.0 - Initial version
*Based on [lancethomps' gist](https://gist.github.com/lancethomps/a5ac103f334b171f70ce2ff983220b4f) and other scripts.*
